RoME 0.2.1
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • RoME
  • Changelog

    Conversion of MEDITS format coordinates in decimal degrees format

    MEDITS.to.dd.Rd

    Conversion of MEDITS format coordinates in decimal degrees format

    MEDITS.to.dd(data)

    Arguments

    data

    data frame of the hauls data (TA, table A) in MEDITS format

    Value

    The function returns the data frame of the TA table with the coordinates expressed as decimal degrees.

    Author

    Walter Zupa

    Examples

    MEDITS.to.dd(TA)
#>     TYPE_OF_FILE COUNTRY AREA VESSEL  GEAR RIGGING DOORS YEAR MONTH DAY
#> 1             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  11
#> 2             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  11
#> 3             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  11
#> 4             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  11
#> 5             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  11
#> 6             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  11
#> 7             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  12
#> 8             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  12
#> 9             TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8  12
#> 10            TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2007     8   9
#> 11            TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2008     7  29
#> 12            TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2008     7  29
#> 13            TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2008     7  29
#> 14            TA     ITA   10    PEC GOC73    GC73  WHS8 2008     7  29
